docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN FUTURES GROUP
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN FUTURES GROUP

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,725.00 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN FUTURES GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN FUTURES GROUP
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO DEFEND, NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-25-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-23-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN FUTURES GROUP $1,725.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,780.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN FUTURES GROUP HEARING SET FOR SEP-03-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF SEP-03-1993, DENIED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $97.10 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN FUTURES GROUP
